channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Riley's Classes
item.description: Addon for Aldi's Classes, makes classes interact with other mods and adds new ones!

item.title: Deciduous Trees
item.description: Trees slowly shed their leaves based on temperature. Vanilla and Eco Machina compatible.

item.title: Leaf Litter
item.description: Adds dynamic leaf litter that can be raked, composted, and used as mulch.

item.title: The Crown & The Coalition Server Tweaks
item.description: Server tweaks for The Crown & The Coalition.

item.title: Traveling Bells
item.description: Teleport Between Linked Bells. Strike With Mallet To Set Arrival Point and Teleport. (Comes at Cost)

item.title: Advanced Chat
item.description: A fully customizable, movable, resizable chat overlay for Vintage Story. Take control of your chat w

item.title: Laboror's Multi-Tools - Expanded Metals Compatibility
item.description: Adds metal variants to Laboror's Tools.

item.title: Spaturno and Trini's Secure Shelter
item.description: Shared extradimensional cottage inspired from D&D spell Leomund's Secure Shelter.

item.title: DesertWearPatch
item.description: Patches in recipes for DesertWear.

item.title: Fauna of the Stone Age: Capreolinae
item.description: A collection of New World deer from the Holocene.

item.title: Fauna of the Stone Age: Pantherinae
item.description: A collection of big cats from human history.

item.title: Earthfed - More Fertilizers
item.description: Realistic fertilizers made from feathers, seaweed, fish, and blood

item.title: Rabbit Taming
item.description: Have your fluffy friends as pets. Hares are now tamable and become Bunnies. Requires Pet Ai.

item.title: Building Commands
item.description: A mod that adds commands like /fill to enable large-scale structures created by commands

item.title: Extreme Weathers [ALPHA]
item.description: Introduces new weather mechanics using the vanilla weather system.

item.title: Ancient Tools Fork
item.description: 1.22 Fork

item.title: Wild West Climate
item.description: Makes the west drier, hotter, and more desert-like as you travel across the world.

item.title: Eternal Seraph Patch
item.description: Патч для серверу Вічний Серафим. Patch for the server Eternal Seraph.

item.title: DonningTime
item.description: Adds a configurable delay to the donning of armor (and optionally clothes)

item.title: xSkills Gilded Fork
item.description: This mod adds a beautifully designed, immersive, and user-friendly interface for xSkills.

item.title: NDL ExpandedGrowth (Tree Growth Module)
item.description: Adds a method for growing larger variants of trees.

item.title: Rust Girls - Player Model
item.description: BE the waifu!

item.title: More animations
item.description: Better body and face animations

item.title: Terrain Slabs
item.description: Don't jump. Just walk.

item.title: Ancestral Bliss Shaders
item.description: Shaders compatible with most GPUs

item.title: Place On Slabs
item.description: Lets you place some stuff on slabs

item.title: Overhaul lib legacy compatibility
item.description: Compat for firearms, crossbows, combatoverhaul

item.title: Combat Overhaul Fork
item.description: 1.22 fork

item.title: JSCM Frozen Struggles
item.description: A new modpack for my girlfriend and I. Focused around a Sub-Artic playthrough

item.title: Optimum
item.description: High-performance client fork. Compile-time patches, no Harmony. Same gameplay, faster frames
